text: This chapter applies only to a municipality with a population of more than 5,000.

# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.002 — Applicability

This chapter applies only to a municipality with a population of more than 5,000.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter applies only to a municipality with a population of more than 5,000.
